variables.name: it_target
variables.value: {{switch(1.subjects[].company.employee_range; "11-50 employees"; 100; "51-200 employees"; 40; "201-500 employees"; 40; "501-1000 employees"; 40; "1001-5000 employees"; 40; "5001-10000 employees"; 40; 40)}}

variables.name: biz_target
variables.value: {{switch(1.subjects[].company.employee_range; "11-50 employees"; 100; "51-200 employees"; 60; "201-500 employees"; 60; "501-1000 employees"; 50; "1001-5000 employees"; 60; "5001-10000 employees"; 60; 60)}}
